name: ai-change-evidence
description: Engineering experience handoff for AI coding agents.

scripts.check: node --check src/cli.js && node --check src/evidence.js && node --check src/init.js && node --check src/ledger.js && node --check src/mcp.js && node --check src/redact.js && node --check scripts/smoke-package-install.js && node --check scripts/smoke-mcp-client.js && node --check scripts/stress-ledger-concurrency.js && node --check .codex/hooks/ace-stop-handoff.js
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm test && npm run smoke:mcp-client && npm run stress:ledger && npm run smoke:package-install && npm pack --dry-run
